title: Implement RPL preference check in forward_mesh_to_upstream before TUN
description: Parse dst from IPv6 in mesh_to_upstream result. Use router.route or lookup_route to decide RPL vs TUN. If mesh route exists, forward internally with source routing; else TUN. Update hybrid classify if needed. Follow NO DEAD CODE, no comments.
close_reason: Fixed coap deaddrop/provider, CCP-6/7 channel/hop/sync in all langs + vectors, RPL forwarding; conventions followed; lints/tests/builds passed
